title: Rename device - Rename with no characters [New]
scenario: Device name field with all characters cleared does not disable Done button and fails to restore old name on Cancel in Rename Device screen
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap on the device name field to edit it
Clear all characters from the device name field
Observe the device name displayed in Device Settings
Tap on the device name field again to edit
Observe the device name displayed in the edit field
expected: Done button is disabled when all characters are cleared. After tapping Cancel, the old device name is restored and displayed in Device Settings. When tapping the device name field again, the old name is still displayed.
